navigation.siteDescription: Factory-direct flood barrier supply from China.

footer.systemStatus: Tucsenberg · Jiangsu Tucson Borg Technology Co., Ltd. · sales@tucsenberg.com
footer.description: Factory-direct flood barrier supply from China.

hero.title: Factory-Direct Flood Barriers from China
hero.subtitle: Five product lines, one coordinated factory pool, one QC standard. Sandbag alternatives, garage flood barriers and removable flood gates — for dealers, importers, brands and businesses, from a single carton to mixed full containers.

preview.label: Product line map
preview.title: ABS, aluminum, flood bags, tube dams and FRP
preview.description: Start with the opening, the ground and the order size. The same RFQ can route to standard stock, custom-cut openings, private label packaging or mixed-line consolidation.

hero.proofAriaLabel: Tucsenberg quote, warranty and factory-pool facts

problems.title: Five product lines
problems.description: Sandbag alternatives, garage flood barriers and removable flood gates for dealers, importers, brands and businesses.

structure.title: ABS Interlocking Boxwall — TB-BW series
structure.description: Freestanding, tool-free, no fixing to the building. The fastest line to deploy and the easiest to brand as your own.

content.title: Aluminum Flood Gates — TB-AG series
content.description: Demountable plank systems for doors, garages and loading docks. Straight, gable-end and curved configurations, custom-cut to your opening schedule.

deployment.title: Absorbent Flood Bags — TB-FB series
deployment.description: Sandless sandbags that activate in minutes. Carton quantities, private label packaging, the lowest-friction first order in our range.

inquiry.title: Water & Air-Filled Tube Dams — TB-TD series
inquiry.description: Perimeter protection where rigid barriers can't seal: long runs, rough ground, emergency and municipal stock.

multilingual.title: FRP Composite Planks — TB-CP series
multilingual.description: Pultruded composite planks: corrosion-free, non-conductive, built for coastal and industrial sites. In development with our pultrusion partners.

answer.title: Who we supply
answer.description: The same product range supports trade stock, private label programs, custom-cut project schedules and small-batch first orders.

pageStructure.title: Dealers & Distributors
pageStructure.description: Stable specs, spare-parts continuity, margin room protected by our no-retail-pricing policy.

replacementSurface.title: Importers & Brands (OEM)
replacementSurface.description: Private label across all five lines; moulded logos, custom packaging, your documentation.

inquiryPath.title: Contractors & Projects
inquiryPath.description: Custom-cut per approved drawings, mixed-material supply for one site, spec sheets your engineer can read.

cloudflareFoundation.title: Small Business Buyers
cloudflareFoundation.description: Carton and pallet orders welcome. First time importing? We'll walk you through it.

startPath.title: How we work
startPath.description: From RFQ to mixed-line shipment, the buying path is built for standard stock, custom-cut openings and OEM/private label supply.

brand.title: Send your RFQ
brand.description: Openings, quantities, market. Photos and drawings welcome.

content.title: Quote in 12 hours
content.description: Standard items quoted in 12 hours; custom configurations within 48.

forms.title: Paid sample
forms.description: Sample fee credited against your first order.

deploy.title: Production & QC
deploy.description: One QC standard across the factory pool; inspection report before shipment.

finalCta.title: Protecting openings or building a product line — either way, start with the numbers.
finalCta.description: Send your requirement; standard items quoted in 12 hours.
finalCta.trust: Standard items quoted in 12 hours · 3-year warranty on all standard lines · Factory pool supplies established brands

overview.title: Flood Barrier Product Lines
overview.description: Five flood barrier lines for dealers, importers, brands, contractors and small business buyers: ABS boxwall, aluminum flood gates, absorbent flood bags, tube dams and FRP composite planks.
overview.cardsDescription: Match the opening, ground type and order size before asking for exact quotation details.
overview.boundaryDescription: The quote is the price conversation. Send dimensions, quantity, market and delivery port so the line can be checked properly.
overview.pathDescription: Scan the five lines, compare where each one fits, then send an RFQ with dimensions, quantity and market.
overview.detailTitle: When to open a product page
overview.detailDescription: Use the detail pages when the buying question depends on material, opening type, deployment method or OEM/private label options.

mainOffer.title: ABS, aluminum, bags, tube dams and FRP
mainOffer.description: Five product lines, one coordinated factory pool, one QC standard.

proofMaterials.title: Specs and supply boundaries
proofMaterials.description: Tables show typical product parameters and where final values must be confirmed at quotation.

nextStep.title: RFQ-ready next step
nextStep.description: Openings, quantities, market and delivery port are enough to start. Photos and drawings help.

items.content: Prices stay in the quotation, not on public pages
items.assets: Photos and drawings are welcome with the RFQ
items.details: Custom-cut and private label details are confirmed per order

scan.title: Scan the five lines
scan.description: ABS boxwall, aluminum gates, flood bags, tube dams and FRP planks cover different site conditions.

compare.title: Check the fit
compare.description: Defined openings, perimeters, emergency stock, rough ground and corrosive sites need different materials.

ask.title: Send the RFQ
ask.description: Standard items are quoted in 12 hours; custom configurations within 48.

items.families: Product family, material and deployment method affect the recommendation
items.comparison: Specification tables and drawings decide custom-cut configurations
items.markets: OEM/private label, cartons, pallets, LCL, container and project schedules are quoted differently

cta.title: Need exact line, quantity or configuration detail?
cta.description: Send an RFQ with openings, quantity, market and delivery port.

market.specsComingSoon: Specifications coming soon. Contact us for detailed product data.

cta.heading: Need to review {marketLabel}?
cta.description: Send an inquiry with dimensions, quantity, market, timeline and photos or drawings if available.

abs-flood-barriers.label: ABS Interlocking Boxwall Flood Barriers
abs-flood-barriers.description: Freestanding ABS interlocking flood barriers for driveways, doorways and paved perimeters.

aluminum-flood-gates.label: Aluminum Flood Gates & Demountable Barrier Systems
aluminum-flood-gates.description: Demountable plank systems for doors, garages, loading docks and shopfronts.

absorbent-flood-bags.label: Absorbent Flood Bags (Sandless Sandbags)
absorbent-flood-bags.description: Water-activated sandless flood bags for low-level freshwater leaks, thresholds and reseller stock.

flood-tube-dams.label: Water & Air-Filled Tube Dams
flood-tube-dams.description: Inflatable PVC tube dams for long runs, rough ground and planned emergency stock.

frp-flood-barriers.label: FRP Composite Planks
frp-flood-barriers.description: Order-driven pultruded FRP flood planks for coastal, industrial and electrical sites.

abs-boxwall.label: ABS boxwall units
abs-boxwall.description: Straight, curved and gable-end ABS units for freestanding runs.

aluminum-gates.label: Aluminum demountable systems
aluminum-gates.description: Planks, posts, seals and spares custom-cut to each opening schedule.

absorbent-bags.label: Water-activated flood bags
absorbent-bags.description: Flat-packed SAP-core bags for rain and inland freshwater flooding.

tube-dams.label: Inflatable tube dam sections
tube-dams.description: Five and ten metre PVC sections with pump, skirt, nails and repair kit.

frp-planks.label: Pultruded composite planks
frp-planks.description: Order-driven FRP plank profiles with span and deflection data compiled per first runs.

highlights.0: Freestanding L-profile; no anchors, no drilling, no damage to the surface.
highlights.1: Mechanical locking-and-coupling joint; no tools, no loose pins.
highlights.2: Straight, inward/outward curve and gable-end units available at every height.

trade.moq: Quoted by line: carton, pallet, LCL, container, or project schedule.
trade.leadTime: Standard items quoted within 12 hours; custom configurations within 48.
trade.packaging: Carton, pallet, LCL, container, and mixed-line consolidation.

highlights.1: Replacement seals, clamps and single planks stay orderable for years.
highlights.2: Wall-mounted channels, ground-socket posts and freestanding posts.

technical.material: PP non-woven shell with SAP core
technical.shelfLife: 3 years vacuum-packed, stored cool and dry

highlights.2: Built for rain and inland freshwater flooding, not salt or brackish water.

highlights.1: Works on grass, soil and broken ground where rigid barriers cannot seal.
highlights.2: Full accessory kit ships in the bag.

trade.leadTime: Standard items quoted within 12 hours; custom configurations within 48.
